CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Continued To Oct-27-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Status Of Approval Of Special Needs Trust For The Benefit Of Antoinette Spears
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Continued To Sep-01-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Lawrence A. Strick, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and Petitioner: Virginia Spears, guardian ad litem for Antoinette Spears.
Petitioner Virginia Spears' Motion for modification of Order Approving Compromise of Disputed Claim of a person with a disability (Antoinette Spears) is heard this day.
After argument of counsel the matter is continued to September 1, 2015 for Status of Approval of Special Need Trust for the Benefit of Antoinette Spears.
Court will sign order for modification of Order approving compromise.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2015 Continued To Jul-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action For A Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Person with a Disability's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Lawrence A. Strick, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Virginai Spears, mother and guardian ad litem for person with a disability;(Antoinette Spears) present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $450,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $124,150.00 payable to The Strick Law Offices
Costs: $34,908.19
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement of judgment: $159,058.19
A net balance of $290,941.81 to be disbursed as follows: A check made payable from the Trust Account of the Law Offices of Lawrence A. Strick to Senior Medi Benefits, Inc., Trustee for the Benefit of Antoinette Spears in the amoung of $145,470.90
A check made payable by the Regents of the University of California to the Department of Health Care Services in the amount of $145,470.90.
Additional Orders: The court makes the following additional orders: This approval is conditioned on approval of a Special Needs Trust by the Probate Department of this Court.
Status Hearing Scheduled on May 21, 2015 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for status of Approval of Special Needs Trust. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
